sections.label: Intro
lines: On the hills where silence lingers,
Shadows stretch like broken kings,
The wind still carries names we whispered,
Through the clash of shattered things.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Golden armour in the twilight,
Dust where glory used to stand,
Echoes of a fearless heartbeat
Now slipping through my trembling hands.
No songs in foreign streets for sorrow,
No laughter where the strangers gaze,
We bury fire beneath the marrow,
And mourn in quiet, hidden ways.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Don’t let them see our ruin,
Don’t let them speak your name in vain…

sections.label: Chorus
lines: How the mighty have fallen,
Like stars torn out of the sky,
How the brave turn to silence,
But their echoes never die.
How the mighty have fallen,
Still I call through the night—
If love outlives the battle,
Then you’re still in the fight.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Your bow once sang like thunder rolling,
Your blade like lightning split the dark,
You ran where fear refused to follow,
You lit the war inside my heart.
No eagle soared as fierce as you did,
No lion burned with such a flame,
And now the fields are cold and empty,
But I still whisper out your name.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: No oil, no crown, no victory remains—
Just love that outlives all the pain…

sections.label: Chorus
lines: How the mighty have fallen,
Like stars torn out of the sky,
How the brave turn to silence,
But their echoes never die.
How the mighty have fallen,
Still I call through the night—
If love outlives the battle,
Then you’re still in the fight.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: I am torn where you once stood beside me,
A brother not by blood but by soul,
No depth, no grave, no ending can hide me
From the love that has made me whole.
Your memory burns like a signal,
Through valleys of ash and of stone—
If I rise from this ruin,
I won’t rise alone.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: How the mighty have fallen,
But your fire still remains,
In the pulse of the broken,
In the echo of your name.
How the mighty have fallen,
Yet your light still survives—
For love is stronger than death is,
And it carries our lives.

sections.label: Outro
lines: On the hills where silence lingers…
I still hear you in the wind…
